## AbstractModelClass.preProcess() method

Pre-processes a document after retrieving it from the database, applying any necessary transformations defined in the schema.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static preProcess(doc: any, options: QueryExecutorGetCommonOptions): Promise<any>;
```
